mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_add_info_form ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_add_info_form WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY major_category_idx ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment_add_info_form (risk_id, detail_action, major_category_idx, major_category, middle_category, facility, frequency, work_hours, worker, co_worker, created_at) VALUES (#{riskId}, #{detailAction}, #{majorCategoryIdx}, #{majorCategory}, #{middleCategory}, #{facility}, #{frequency}, #{workHours}, #{worker}, #{coWorker}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_add_info_form SET detail_action = #{detailAction}, major_category_idx = #{majorCategoryIdx}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, middle_category = #{middleCategory}, facility = #{facility}, frequency = #{frequency}, work_hours = #{workHours}, worker = #{worker}, co_worker = #{coWorker} WHERE id = #{id}
